About Me

Crafting Stories,
Frame by Frame

I'm a video editor and digital content creator from India, specialising in short-form social media content that gets results. I combine fast-paced storytelling, precision cuts, and AI-powered visuals to create content that keeps viewers hooked till the last second.


Whether it's a brand reel, an educational short, or pure entertainment — I obsess over every frame to make sure your content stands out in a crowded feed.

Work

Client Project

Tech Awareness Reel

A high-impact Instagram reel focused on technology awareness and online privacy. Built with fast cuts, animated subtitles, and scroll-stopping visuals designed to retain viewers from the first second.

Client Project

BlackBerry Rise & Fall

An educational reel unpacking BlackBerry's rise and fall — how great security couldn't compensate for poor usability. Delivered with engaging captions, dynamic pacing, and storytelling that educates and entertains.

Watch on Instagram

Short animated and infographic-style videos using AI tools to explain tech and digital topics in a simple, engaging way.
